name: Lovisa Holdings Limited
analysis: LOV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 45% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$23.4200, stop A$19.8297, target A$29.1959 (1.61:1) — then trail it.
